question_text: Which of the following is an example of a moment in everyday life?

options.label: A
options.text: A book falling straight down to the ground

options.label: B
options.text: Using a spanner to tighten a bolt

options.label: C
options.text: A car accelerating in a straight line

explanation: Using a spanner to tighten a bolt involves applying a force at a distance from the pivot (the bolt's centre), creating a turning moment. This rotates the bolt, demonstrating moments in a practical, everyday example.
